.drone.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the Docker image used for the commit-stage build step to version 3.0.0.
Upgrade the Docker image used for the integration-test-stage build step to version 3.0.0.
Comment out the git-tag-stage step, effectively disabling automatic git tagging in the CI pipeline.
.drone.yml.before:
- name: git-tag-stage
    image: alpine/git
    commands:
      - export MAVEN_REVISION=$(grep -m 1 '<revision>' pom.xml | cut -d '<' -f2  | cut -d '>' -f2)
      - echo "picked up maven revision [$MAVEN_REVISION] from POM file"
      - export GIT_TAG_NAME=$MAVEN_REVISION.${DRONE_BRANCH}.${DRONE_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}
      - echo "build git tag name [$GIT_TAG_NAME] from environment"
      - env
      - echo "tagging current commit with tag [$GIT_TAG_NAME]"
      - git tag $GIT_TAG_NAME
      - echo "pushing tag to central repo"
      - git push origin $GIT_TAG_NAME
    when:
      branch:
        - main
      status:
        - success
.drone.yml.after:

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit start-class property for the Spring Boot application.
Enable deprecation and warning flags in the Maven compiler plugin.
Configure Spring Boot Maven plugin to use a classifier and not attach the full jar.
Update resource inclusion pattern to match the new Spring Boot jar classifier.
Update resource inclusion pattern in another profile to match the new Spring Boot jar classifier.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove the -XX:MetaspaceSize JVM flag which is deprecated or less relevant in newer JDK versions and Alpine environments.
Add an empty AGENT_JAVA_OPTS environment variable to allow for future injection of Java agent options.

src/main/docker/docker-entrypoint.sh.general_idea: Add logging of the AGENT_JAVA_OPTS environment variable to the startup script output.
Include AGENT_JAVA_OPTS in the java command line arguments to support Java agents.
Change the jar file reference from a specific variable to a wildcard pattern to handle versioned filenames.
Remove the logging of the JAVA_APPLICATION environment variable as it is no longer used in the jar path.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Disable ANSI color codes in console output to ensure clean logs in containerized environments.
Restrict exposed actuator endpoints to a specific safe subset instead of exposing all.
Enable Kubernetes-style liveness and readiness probes via the dedicated probes property.
Configure Jackson to exclude null values from JSON responses to reduce payload size and improve API cleanliness.

src/test/docker/cnj-hello-backend-spring.general_idea: Rename environment variable from JAVA_OPTS to AGENT_JAVA_OPTS to align with a specific container runtime convention.
Add explicit JVM memory settings via DOCKER_JAVA_OPTS to ensure stable runtime behavior.

src/test/resources/META-INF/test-config..general_idea: Update the readiness probe path to use the dedicated /actuator/health/readiness endpoint introduced in Spring Boot 2.3+.
